attributes.content:
## Overview

The Brand Guide card gives the workspace a structured home for comprehensive brand identity: logos, colors, fonts, voice, usage guidelines. The source of truth for brand consistency.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Brand Guide usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[AI Image]]** -- Brand Guide can incorporate generated visuals or treat image output as a linked asset.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Brand Guide into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Brand Guide can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Brand Guide often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Document]]** -- Brand Guide can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Mockup]]** -- Mockup can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Brand Guide.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Brand Guide as the structured home for comprehensive brand identity: logos, colors, fonts, voice, usage guidelines. The source of truth for brand consistency and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Brand Guide when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Brand Guide stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Brand Guide
cardInfo.summary: Comprehensive brand identity: logos, colors, fonts, voice, usage guidelines. The source of truth for brand consistency.
